templates.name: Real Estate Professional
templates.subject: {first_name}, are your listings getting the attention they deserve?
templates.body:
Hi {first_name},

I came across {company} and wanted to reach out directly.

Most real estate professionals I speak with are sitting on incredible expertise — but their online presence doesn't reflect it. Random social posts, no follow-up system, and paid traffic going to a generic homepage with no retargeting.

At Lens Of Light, we build complete digital revenue systems specifically for real estate professionals:

- High-impact video content that showcases your listings and builds real authority
- Conversion-optimized landing pages that turn profile visitors into qualified leads
- CRM automation that follows up with every lead automatically — no one slips through
- Meta Ads with full attribution so you know exactly what's working

We've helped scale brands like @iambillionairebarbie (1M), @dremedici (719K), and @devinjatho (415K) — and we bring that same system to professionals like you.

One dashboard. One strategic partner. No more disconnected freelancers.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call this week to see if it's a fit?

Best,
{YOUR_NAME}
Lens Of Light
{YOUR_WEBSITE}
{YOUR_INSTAGRAM}

templates.body:
Hi {first_name},

Most service businesses are losing potential clients every day — not because their service isn't great, but because their digital presence is fragmented. Multiple agencies, random posting, and no automated follow-up strategy means leads that could have converted simply fall through the cracks.

At Lens Of Light, we build what we call a Complete Digital Revenue Machine — one integrated system that handles everything:

We've used this exact system to scale brands like @iambillionairebarbie (1M), @dremedici (719K), and @devinjatho (415K). Clients see 30–50% more conversions from their existing traffic without adding to their workload.
